live_newsroom.title: NBA board
live_newsroom.headline: NBA board
live_newsroom.snapshot: San Antonio faces elimination at home in Game 6 of the Western Conference finals, with Victor Wembanyama and Shai Gilgeous-Alexander anchoring the main player context. NBA.com lists the game for 8:30 p.m. ET; FanDuel Research lists Spurs -3.5 with a 219.5 total, so the spread, total and player-prop screen deserve the first betting read.

live_newsroom.title: Betting odds
live_newsroom.headline: Betting odds
live_newsroom.snapshot: The market leans clearly toward Philadelphia Phillies; injury, pitching, weather or lineup news can still move the number. A -230 moneyline implies roughly 69.7% before vig. Philadelphia Phillies is getting more expensive, which usually points to stronger support or new information behind the favorite. Wind is helping carry, so the total deserves a closer look before first pitch.

Spurs Price Shortens to -190 | MARKET: San Antonio Spurs favored over New York Knicks | IMPLIED PROBABILITY: San Antonio Spurs 65.5% before vig | MOVEMENT: Open -180 -> Current -190 (shortened for San Antonio Spurs)

Hurricanes Price Shortens to -164 | MARKET: Carolina Hurricanes favored over Vegas Golden Knights | IMPLIED PROBABILITY: Carolina Hurricanes 62.1% before vig | MOVEMENT: Open -150 -> Current -164 (shortened for Carolina Hurricanes)

Cavaliers Price Shortens to -205 | MARKET: Virginia Cavaliers favored over NC State Wolfpack | IMPLIED PROBABILITY: Virginia Cavaliers 67.2% before vig | MOVEMENT: Open -193 -> Current -205 (shortened for Virginia Cavaliers)

Frogs Price Shortens to -230 | MARKET: TCU Horned Frogs favored over North Carolina Tar Heels | IMPLIED PROBABILITY: TCU Horned Frogs 69.7% before vig | MOVEMENT: Open -217 -> Current -230 (shortened for TCU Horned Frogs)

sections.title: Futures Watch
cards: College Football Futures: Keep the board visible year-round because bettors track long-range prices months before kickoff.
NFL Futures: Watch schedule strength, quarterback health, roster movement and divisional prices.
NBA Futures: Track playoff paths, injury news, rest patterns and championship price movement.
NHL Futures: Watch goalie health, playoff seeding, travel spots and market adjustment.
Soccer Futures: Track title races, promotion/relegation pressure, tournament paths and transfer-window movement.
Tennis/Golf Futures: Draws, form, surface, course fit and injury news can reshape prices quickly.
sections.headline: Futures Watch

LINE / ODDS: FanDuel Research lists Spurs -3.5 and total 219.5.
